firstName.title: First name
firstName.description: Patient legal first name. Collected from the user in plain text. Required.

lastName.title: Last name
lastName.description: Patient legal last name. Collected from the user in plain text. Required.

email.title: Email (chart key)
email.description: Plain email string the user typed (e.g. jane.doe@example.com). Used as the Person Account chart key only. This action does NOT send email. Never wrap in a JSON object, never include recipientId, to, subject, body, or message. Required.

mobilePhone.title: Mobile phone (optional)
mobilePhone.description: Plain phone number string the user shared (e.g. +14155550100). Optional.

dateOfBirth.title: Date of birth (YYYY-MM-DD, optional)
dateOfBirth.description: ISO date the user shared (e.g. 1988-05-04). Optional but recommended for identity matching.

consentToContact.title: Consent to contact
consentToContact.description: Set to true only after the patient explicitly confirms they consent to being contacted about appointments and care. Do not default to true without confirmation.
